summary: This document outlines the business strategy for 'OS for Healthcare,' proposing an AI-driven operational model for UK GP practices to improve efficiency and profitability. It details the solution of automating processes via an AI orchestrator and defines a revenue model based on profit sharing and advertising. The text also analyzes the market opportunity, comparing the potential disruption to Revolut's impact on banking.

sniff_test_notes: Document cuts off mid-sentence at the end. Financial projections and profit-sharing revenue model are included.
